name: chaingpt
description: The Web3 toolkit for Claude Code. AI-powered (ChainGPT chat / NFT / Solidity generator + auditor / crypto news / Solidity LLM) PLUS generic Web3: multi-chain wallet portfolios, token research (DexScreener), risk scanning (GoPlus + Honeypot), on-chain analytics, AI-enriched composed intel, MAINNET contract deployment with mandatory audit gate, MAINNET DEX trading (OpenOcean + Jupiter), AND MAINNET DeFi (Aave V3 lending across 7 chains + Lido stETH staking + EigenLayer restaking). 45+ audited Solidity patterns + zero-credit mock server. Custody-free — user signs externally.
